title: slashNEW 2026!
abstract:
SlashNEW is a celebration of all things technology, uniting the most innovative thinkers and passionate techies that are building a brighter future for the Hunter.

SlashNEW is Newcastle’s biggest technology conference. Running in 2026 for its fourth year, the two-day conference aims to celebrate the vibrant Newcastle technology scene and give technology professionals in the area access to upskilling and networking locally.

SlashNEW showcases fantastic keynotes, a line-up of speakers from Newcastle and beyond, panel discussions, workshops, and ample networking opportunities. All supported by a group of fantastic local and international sponsors.
